content.en:
Fighting against Xiao Yue was a seven-star peak god general, and the gap in strength between the two sides was too large.

Maybe at the beginning, other people didn't know Xiao Yue, but now almost all the information is known, and Xiao Yue's identity is basically known by other god generals.

Therefore, the seven-star peak god general will naturally not challenge a nine-star god general to the death, the gap between the seven-star god general and the nine-star god general is too big, once they fight, they will be killed in an instant.

Of course, there are also some seven-star peak god generals who dare to challenge the eight-star god generals, even if they can't beat it, they can support it for a while, at least they can show their combat talent and potential in such a game.

As each match progressed, Xiao Yue won a match almost effortlessly, because Xiao Yue's opponents almost all conceded defeat.

And the Nine Star Gods will hardly fight each other at the beginning, so in the second round, the Nine Star Gods will hardly have any pressure at the beginning, and they can almost easily win.

Time passed day by day, and I don't know how many games were played.

On this day, Xiao Yue finally fought against a nine-star god general.

The other party was a nine-star early stage god general of the Blood Moon Sect, and he did not choose to admit defeat, but fought with Xiao Yue.

The Blood Moon Sect had a hatred with the Void Heaven lineage, and the Blood Moon Sect had sent people to join forces with other forces to besiege Ye Tian, so Xiao Yue hated the people of the Blood Moon Sect very much.

As a result, Xiao Yue made a move, and it was a chaotic supernatural power.

Although with the strength of her divine general, she could not exert the power of the chaotic supernatural power, and could only use the rudimentary chaotic supernatural power, but as soon as this chaotic supernatural power came out, the audience was still shocked.

"Great Destruction!"

This is a relatively high list of Chaos Divine Powers, although it has now obtained a lot of Chaos Divine Power inheritance from the domain realm, and the ranking of the Great Destruction Technique has been lowered a lot, but it is still in the top 100.

It can be said that it is simply too rare for a god to be able to practice the Great Destruction Technique.

Rumble!

The light of the Great Destruction Technique enveloped the Nine-Star Divine General of the Blood Moon Sect, only to see that the Nine-Star Divine General had no time to admit defeat at all, and the whole person directly turned into powder and dissipated between heaven and earth.

Killing a nine-star early stage god general in one move is terrifying!

"Little junior brother, your wife has actually practiced the Great Destruction Technique at the level of the Divine General, and you have paid a lot of price!" Long Hai Zhenjun said in surprise.

Although there are countless resources nowadays, and the major forces are rich, there is one resource that is still lacking, and that is the resource that can fuse talents, even in the domain realm, this kind of resource is extremely rare.

And with the advent of today's prosperous era of cultivation, countless divine generals, heavenly monarchs, and true monarchs have risen one by one, and the consumption of resources that can fuse talents is very serious, and many chaotic divine powers have almost broken their inheritance.

There are even some resources that fuse talent and are sold at the auction of the Chaos Trading House to a degree higher than the value of the half-way weapon, and the value has refreshed people's cognition.

If it was before, a half-way weapon would be enough to exchange for a large number of resources to fuse talents!

The times are different, and the value of some things is naturally different.

It is precisely because of the lack of resources that can fuse talents that few of the gods participating in the competition have powerful supernatural powers, let alone chaotic supernatural powers.

Therefore, Xiao Yue suddenly showed a chaotic supernatural power such as a Great Destruction Technique, which really shocked countless powerhouses.

"Senior Brother Long Hai, compared to the Gifted Ancestral Pool, what are the few resources?Among these gods, there must be many people who have cultivated supernatural powers that are even more powerful than the Great Destruction Technique, but those people have not been exposed yet!" Ye Tian said.

"That's right!"

Ryuhae Zhenjun smiled.

As Xiao Yue showed his combat strength, some of the mid-nine-star god generals and even the late nine-star god generals he met next didn't dare to fight Xiao Yue and directly chose to admit defeat.

After all, losing a game doesn't affect anything, and you can still advance to the next round.

In the last match of the third group of Xiao Yue, she encountered a powerful opponent, a god general from the transcendent force Chaos Life Alliance.

Under normal circumstances, many Chaos Beings have almost no Divine Generals, because they are born in the Heavenly Destiny Realm, but some Chaos Beings descendants have the level of Divine Generals.

In addition, the descendants of Chaos Life are all powerful in blood, so many powerful gods and generals have also been born.

The god general who was about to fight with Xiao Yue was a descendant of the bloodline of the Tianlin Beast, which was an incomparably powerful chaotic life, even much more powerful than the Starhorn Beast clan, but the Tianlin Beast was extremely rare, and there were only a dozen or so at present.

But there are a lot of descendants of the Tianlin Beast bloodline, they are not pure Tianlin Beasts, they only have some Tianlin Beast characteristics, but their potential is still much stronger than many Chaos Life Races.

"I am a descendant of the Chaos Life Alliance Tianlin Beast Dao Ancestor, my name is Killing Spirit, I know that you are the wife of that Wanfa Daozi, but unfortunately the identity of that Wanfa Daozi has no deterrent effect on me. I suggest you throw in the towel, or you'll end up in this match!"

The Killing Spirit was very arrogant and confident.

"You think you can beat me?"

Xiao Yue said coldly.

"Naturally!" Killing Spirit said with a smile, "My opponent will always only be the geniuses of the other three transcendent forces, and as for the other geniuses, I don't care about any of them!"

Direction of the Void Heaven Temple.

Long Hai Zhenjun frowned: "This killing spirit is not ranked high on the Ancestral Tablet God General List, far inferior to Xiao Yue, I didn't expect it to be so arrogant!"

"He has hidden his strength!" Ye Tian said: "This killing spirit should have the combat power of a nine-star peak god general, and he has cultivated many chaotic divine powers, plus he has the secret skills and hole cards of transcendent power, he does have this confidence!"

"What, Nine-Star Peak Divine General!" Long Hai Zhenjun hurriedly said: "Little junior brother, although your wife is also a Nine-Star Peak Divine General, the other party is from the transcendent force, and the hole cards she has must be very strong, so it is not as good as ......"

Before Long Hai Zhenjun finished speaking, Ye Tian interrupted: "Senior Brother Long Hai don't worry, Yue'er is sure, otherwise if she doesn't admit defeat, I will also persuade her to admit defeat, there is only one person who really understands her strength, and that is me!"

Saying this, Long Hai Zhenjun nodded.

He also knew that it was impossible for Ye Tian to let his wife take risks, since Ye Tian was not worried, I was afraid that Xiao Yue was really not afraid of a nine-star peak god general.

Thinking of Ye Tian's amazing combat power again, invincible at the same level, he is truly invincible, no one has ever been able to suppress Ye Tian at the same level, and he can hardly see Ye Tian's back.

With Ye Tian's guidance, it is impossible for Xiao Yue not to be strong!

Soon.

Xiao Yue and the Soul Killer really fought, and this game also attracted the attention of many Dao Ancestor incarnations and countless True Monarchs, after all, this game involved transcendent forces, and there was also a wife who was the first True Monarch of the Quasi-Dao Realm.

So, this game can be called the most influential battle!
